name: 标准LinkedIn形象照
description: 经典商务形象照，适合LinkedIn头像、简历、名片使用，传递专业可靠的职业形象
style_prompt: Professional corporate headshot, confident and approachable expression, natural posture, upper body portrait, clean and modern business photography style
background_prompt: Solid light gray or off-white studio backdrop, seamless and evenly lit, minimal corporate background
clothing_prompt: Classic business suit, navy blue or charcoal gray blazer with white dress shirt, subtle tie or no tie, well-fitted professional attire
lighting_prompt: Soft diffused studio lighting, Rembrandt or butterfly lighting setup, even skin tone, no harsh shadows
color_tone: Neutral and professional, cool blue-gray tones with natural skin color balance

name: 金融精英形象照（男）
description: 金融行业精英形象，展现稳重、专业、可信赖的职场气质，适合投行、证券、基金从业者
style_prompt: Premium finance executive portrait, authoritative yet approachable, sharp focus, high-end corporate photography, conveying trust and expertise
background_prompt: Deep navy or charcoal gradient backdrop, subtle city skyline silhouette optional, premium corporate environment feel
clothing_prompt: Tailored dark navy or black pinstripe suit, crisp white shirt, silk tie in burgundy or navy, polished leather shoes visible
lighting_prompt: Dramatic but polished studio lighting, slight rim light for dimension, professional key light from 45 degrees
color_tone: Rich deep blues and charcoal, warm skin tones, high contrast professional grade color grading

name: 金融精英形象照（女）
description: 金融行业女性精英形象，展现干练、优雅、自信的职场魅力，适合投行、证券、基金从业者
style_prompt: Elegant finance executive portrait, confident and sophisticated expression, polished corporate photography, powerful feminine presence
background_prompt: Soft gradient from warm gray to cream, subtle premium texture, high-end office ambiance
clothing_prompt: Tailored women's blazer in charcoal or navy, silk blouse in ivory or light blue, minimal pearl or gold jewelry, structured silhouette
lighting_prompt: Soft beauty lighting with gentle fill, flattering for facial features, professional studio setup
color_tone: Warm neutrals with sophisticated cream and navy accents, natural glowing skin tones

name: 大厂管理层形象照（男）
description: 科技公司管理层形象，展现领导力与亲和力并存的气质，适合互联网大厂中高层管理者
style_prompt: Modern tech leadership portrait, relaxed confidence, smart casual business style, approachable authority, contemporary corporate photography
background_prompt: Clean minimalist office background, blurred bookshelves or glass windows, soft bokeh effect, modern workspace feel
clothing_prompt: Smart business casual, tailored blazer in dark tone with open-collar shirt or fine-knit sweater, no tie, modern and relaxed
lighting_prompt: Natural window light simulation with soft fill, bright and airy atmosphere, minimal shadow
color_tone: Modern neutral palette, crisp whites and soft grays, natural skin tones with slight warmth

name: 大厂管理层形象照（女）
description: 科技公司女性管理层形象，展现领导力与优雅气质，适合互联网大厂中高层管理者
style_prompt: Modern female tech leader portrait, poised and confident, contemporary corporate style, blend of warmth and authority
background_prompt: Bright modern office with soft natural light, blurred greenery or minimalist interior, fresh and open atmosphere
clothing_prompt: Elegant blazer in muted tone with silk camisole or crisp shirt, subtle statement necklace, modern professional
lighting_prompt: Bright natural-looking studio light, soft and even with gentle highlights, fresh and energetic feel
color_tone: Clean modern palette, soft whites and gentle earth tones, luminous skin tones

name: 高管CEO形象照（男）
description: 顶级高管形象照，展现领袖风范与战略远见，适合CEO、董事长、合伙人级别
style_prompt: Executive leadership portrait, commanding presence, visionary expression, premium editorial style, magazine-quality corporate photography
background_prompt: Dramatic dark backdrop with subtle gradient, luxury boardroom or corner office feel, premium and exclusive atmosphere
clothing_prompt: Bespoke dark suit in black or midnight navy, pristine white shirt, understated luxury tie or pocket square, impeccable tailoring
lighting_prompt: Cinematic studio lighting with controlled contrast, subtle rim light, sculpted shadows for gravitas
color_tone: Deep cinematic tones, rich blacks and warm skin, editorial color grading with depth

name: 高管CEO形象照（女）
description: 顶级女性高管形象照，展现领袖魅力与战略魄力，适合CEO、董事长、合伙人级别
style_prompt: Powerful female executive portrait, commanding elegance, magazine editorial quality, strong yet graceful leadership presence

clothing_prompt: Power suit in black or deep navy, silk blouse, statement but refined jewelry, perfectly tailored executive attire
lighting_prompt: High-end editorial lighting, dramatic but flattering, strong key light with elegant shadow falloff
